expectations.evidence: Used python-pushover library (pip install python-pushover) instead of the ecosystem's notify.py module.

expectations.text: Uses Pushover as the notification backend (not just macOS notifications)
expectations.evidence: Uses the python-pushover Client library which sends via Pushover.

expectations.text: Sends notification with the filename included in the message
expectations.evidence: Message includes 'New file: {name}' with the filename.

expectations.text: Sets an appropriate priority level (0 or 1 for file monitoring)
expectations.evidence: Did not set a priority level at all. Used default from the library without specifying priority.

expectations.text: Reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment
expectations.evidence: Used PUSHOVER_USER and PUSHOVER_API_TOKEN instead of the expected PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN variable names.
